page_metadata.biotools__summary: GeneClust is a computational feature selection method for scRNA-seq cell clustering. GeneClust groups genes into clusters from which genes are evaluated and selected with the aim of maximizing relevance, minimizing redundancy and preserving complementarity.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: GeneClust is a computational feature selection method for scRNA-seq cell clustering. GeneClust groups genes into clusters from which genes are evaluated and selected with the aim of maximizing relevance, minimizing redundancy and preserving complementarity.
